contact.errorSendingMessage: Failed to send the message. Please try again.
contact.successSendingMessage: Message sent successfully. We will contact you soon.
contact.networkError: Network error. Please try again later.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Briefly tell us how we can help you
contact.privacyAcceptedLabel: I have read and accept the
contact.requiredFields: Required fields. We usually respond within 24 hours.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.legalNoticeText: In compliance with the duty of information established in Law 34/2002 of July 11 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following information is provided:
legalNotice.activityDescription: Human resources consulting services, recruitment, assessment, and training.
legalNotice.conditionsOfUseDescription: Access to and use of this website grants the status of user and implies full acceptance of these terms. The owner reserves the right to modify, at any time and without prior notice, the presentation and configuration of the website, as well as this legal notice.
legalNotice.intellectualPropertyDescription: All website content (texts, images, design, source code, etc.) is owned by the owner or authorized third parties, and its reproduction without express authorization is prohibited.
legalNotice.applicableLawDescription: The relationship between the user and the owner shall be governed by current Spanish legislation. For any disputes that may arise, both parties submit to the courts and tribunals of Barcelona.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.personalDataCollectedDescription: The following data is collected through the contact form:
privacyPolicy.dataHandlingPurposeDescription: The data is used exclusively to respond to inquiries, information requests, or professional contacts made by the user.
privacyPolicy.legitimacyDescription: The legal basis for processing the data is the user's explicit consent, given by accepting this privacy policy.
privacyPolicy.dataRetentionDescription: The data will be retained only for the time necessary to respond to the inquiry and for as long as legal obligations may arise.
privacyPolicy.dataRecipientsDescription: Data will not be shared with third parties, except where legally required. Data may be processed by service providers necessary for the operation of the website (hosting, email), under confidentiality agreements.
privacyPolicy.userRightsDescription: The user may exercise their rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, and portability by sending a request to the indicated email address. They also have the right to file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).
privacyPolicy.securityDescription: The owner adopts the necessary technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of personal data.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookies Policy
cookiesPolicy.cookiesDescription: This website uses cookies to improve user experience and analyze website traffic. Below you will find detailed information about what cookies are, which cookies we use, and how you can manage your preferences.
cookiesPolicy.cookiesDefinition: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, mobile phone) when you visit a website. Cookies allow the website to remember your actions and preferences over a period of time, so you do not have to re-enter them each time you return to the site.
cookiesPolicy.whatAreCookiesDescription: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, mobile phone) when you visit a website. Cookies allow the website to remember your actions and preferences over a period of time, so you do not have to re-enter them each time you return to the site.
cookiesPolicy.cookieTypesUsed: Types of cookies used on this website
cookiesPolicy.necessaryCookiesDescription: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly and cannot be disabled. They are usually set in response to actions such as setting your privacy preferences.
cookiesPolicy.analysisCookiesDescription: Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting information anonymously. This allows us to improve the performance and content of the website.
cookiesPolicy.useOfAnalysisCookies: These cookies are only used if you give your explicit consent.
cookiesPolicy.ipAnonymization: IP anonymization is enabled where applicable.
cookiesPolicy.listUpdated: This list may be updated if new services are added.
cookiesPolicy.onThisWebsiteYouCan: When visiting this website, you can
cookiesPolicy.changeOrWithdrawConsent: You can change or withdraw your consent at any time by clicking the “Cookie Settings” link available in the website footer.
cookiesPolicy.deactivateCookies: How to disable cookies through your browser?
cookiesPolicy.controlAndDeleteCookies: You can also control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this website.
cookiesPolicy.cookiesPolicyChagesDescription: This Cookies Policy may be updated to reflect changes in legal requirements or website functionality. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated revision date.
cookiesPolicy.anyQuestions: If you have any questions about this Cookies Policy or how we use cookies, you can contact us through

cookieSettings.title: Cookie Settings
cookieSettings.weUseCookies: We use cookies for analytics to improve your experience. By clicking “Accept cookies”, you allow us to use Google Analytics or other analytics scripts.
cookieSettings.changeOrWithdrawConsent: You can change or withdraw your consent at any time by clicking the “Cookie Settings” link available in the website footer.
